payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Move between volume, economics, risk, operations, and investigation. Economics focuses on platform activity and does not show organizer balances or payout status on its own.

nav.economicsDescription: Platform fee recognition and MXN reporting

contextBanner.title: There are payouts here, but no captured charges yet
contextBanner.description: We found {payoutCount} payout lifecycle events in the selected period, but no captured charges or financial adjustments. That's why Economics and Risk show zeros.

sampledReferences.traceScope: Showing {shown} sampled {shown, plural, one {trace} other {traces}} out of {total} {total, plural, one {trace} other {traces}} in this window.
sampledReferences.caseCount: {count} sampled {count, plural, one {case reference} other {case references}}

volume.sectionDescription: High-level payment throughput from captured charges in the selected period.
volume.mixedCurrencyNotice: Summary cards use the dominant source currency ({currency}) in this window. Use the breakdown below for mixed-currency detail.
volume.grossProcessedDescription: Captured payment volume before platform fees are separated.
volume.grossDescription: Total captured payment volume before platform fees.
volume.feesDescription: Fees captured by the platform from those payments.
volume.organizerProceedsDescription: Organizer amount at capture before later payout or risk events.
volume.proceedsDescription: Organizer proceeds at capture before later payout operations or risk events.
volume.capturedPaymentsDescription: Accepted canonical payment captures in this window.
volume.capturesDescription: Canonical captured-payment events included in this view.
volume.currenciesDescription: Captured payment totals grouped by currency.
volume.emptyCurrencies: No captured payment volume was found for the selected window.
volume.emptyState: No captured payment volume was found for the selected window.
volume.traceabilityDescription: Reference period and sampled traces behind this readout.
volume.sampleTracesEmpty: No trace references were found in the selected window.
volume.topOrganizersDescription: A review-focused sample of organizers in this window.
volume.organizerEmpty: No organizer ranking was found for the selected window.
volume.investigationDescription: Use Investigation for deeper lookup and evidence review instead of opening raw traces from the ranking.

investigation.title: Cases and evidence
investigation.description: Use the entry point that matches what you already have. Search first if you only know a payout reference or another technical identifier. Open a trace directly only when support already gave you the trace.
investigation.helpTitle: Where these references usually come from
investigation.evidenceReadyTitle: Evidence is ready for this trace
investigation.evidenceReadyDescription: You already identified a matching trace. Open the trace view to review events, policy context, and statement records.
investigation.lookupIdle: Start with a payout reference, a trace, or another technical identifier.
investigation.evidenceActive: An evidence pack is currently loaded.
investigation.evidenceIdle: Load a trace when you need to review evidence.
investigation.guidanceDescription: Search with payout references, traces, and other technical identifiers shared by support or engineering. Without one of those references, this view will not help much.
investigation.whereToFindIdsTitle: Where those references usually come from
investigation.whereToFindIdsDescription: Payout references usually come from organizer payments. Trace references usually come from support, evidence review, or internal escalation. Idempotency keys are usually shared only by support or engineering.

lookup.title: Find by identifier
lookup.description: Use this when you have a payout reference or another technical reference but not the trace yet.
lookup.idleState: Best when you do not have the trace yet

trace.title: Open a trace
trace.description: Use this when support or engineering already gave you the trace and you want to inspect evidence directly.
trace.idleState: Best when you already know the trace

overview.heroActiveDescription: This view summarizes platform fees captured in the selected period and any financial adjustments applied to them.
overview.heroIdleDescription: There are no captured charges or financial adjustments in this economics window.
overview.windowDescription: Everything below uses this period as the reference window.
overview.statusActive: There is financial activity to review. The detail below breaks it down by currency and MXN conversion.
overview.statusIdle: There is no reportable financial activity in this period yet.
overview.revenueIdleTitle: No captured fees to break down yet
overview.revenueIdleDescription: Once captured fees or adjustments exist in this period, the breakdown by currency and reason will appear here.
overview.conversionIdleTitle: No MXN conversion to review yet
overview.conversionIdleDescription: MXN conversion will appear once captured fees exist in the selected period.

risk.heroAttentionDescription: Use this view to decide which charges, organizers, or events need intervention first.
risk.heroQuietTitle: There is no active debt or dispute in this period
risk.heroQuietDescription: Until captured charges accumulate financial incidents, this view will stay quiet.
risk.reviewExposureDescription: Check whether the amount at risk is concentrated in a small number of organizers or events.
risk.reviewCasesDescription: If disputes are active, prioritize groups with the most open cases before drilling deeper.
risk.reviewPausesDescription: Treat these as operational stop signals before trying to resume or keep charging.
risk.detailIdleTitle: No organizer or event clusters need follow-up right now
risk.detailIdleDescription: When debt, disputes, or policy pauses appear around captured charges, this area will break them down by organizer and by event.

operationsGuidance.fxDescription: Use this only when captured charges already exist in another currency and you need a reference rate to convert them into MXN for reporting.
operationsGuidance.artifactsDescription: Use this when support needs to regenerate or resend the payout statement. Get the payout trace from Cases or Evidence.

sections.operationsNote: Manual actions live here so they don't compete with the overall readout.

overview.title: Platform economics
overview.description: Start here to understand platform fee recognition before moving into operations.

risk.title: Debt and disputes
risk.description: Review the areas that deserve attention first when exposure or open cases appear.

fx.title: Exchange rates
fx.description: Review missing or stale rates before opening the update form.

artifacts.title: Statements and resends
artifacts.description: Review recent versions and deliveries before opening a manual action.

cases.title: Find a case
cases.description: Find the right trace before moving into evidence.

evidence.title: Load evidence
evidence.description: Open an evidence pack only after you know which trace to inspect.

payments.sectionDescription: Primary economics view of captured platform fees and financial adjustments.
payments.primaryMetricDescription: Captured platform fees plus financial adjustments in the reviewed period.
payments.currenciesDescription: How captured fees are distributed by source currency.
payments.traceabilityDescription: Period and references used to build this view.
payments.sampleTracesEmpty: No trace references found in the selected window.
payments.emptyAdjustments: No financial adjustments were found for the selected window.

exposure.sectionDescription: Prioritize intervention by organizer and event risk clusters, with quick access to the supporting traces.
exposure.emptyState: No debt or dispute exposure data was found for the selected window.

mxn.sectionDescription: MXN conversion of captured fees using the available reference rates.
mxn.tableDescription: Each source currency retains original totals and the reference rates used for MXN conversion.
mxn.emptyState: No source-currency events were found for the selected window.

fx.sectionDescription: Register the reference rate used to convert captured fees into MXN when the original charge happened in another currency.
fx.upsertDescription: Use this when a date is missing its reference rate or when support needs to correct one.
fx.ratesTableDescription: Latest daily rates configured for active currencies.
fx.emptyRates: No daily FX rates are configured yet.
fx.noActions: There are no missing or stale rates in the reviewed period.

artifacts.sectionDescription: Regenerate or resend payout statements when support needs them.
artifacts.formDescription: You need the payout trace. Get it from Cases or Evidence.

errorMessages.INVALID_INPUT: We couldn't run this statement action because the request was incomplete.
errorMessages.VALIDATION_FAILED: We couldn't validate this input. Review the fields and try again.
errorMessages.INVALID_STRING: Review this field and try again.
errorMessages.UNAUTHENTICATED: Your session expired before we could run this statement action. Sign in again and retry.
errorMessages.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to run this statement action.
errorMessages.SERVER_ERROR: We couldn't complete this statement action. Please try again or contact support.
errorMessages.ARTIFACT_TRACE_ID_REQUIRED: Add a valid payout trace before running this statement action.
errorMessages.ARTIFACT_REASON_REQUIRED: Add a support reason before running this statement action.
errorMessages.ARTIFACT_SCOPE_SINGLETON_REQUIRED: This statement action only supports one payout trace at a time.
errorMessages.ARTIFACT_UNSUPPORTED_TYPE: This statement type isn't available for manual operations.
errorMessages.ARTIFACT_TRACE_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find a payout statement source for that trace.
errorMessages.ARTIFACT_VERSION_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find the requested statement version for that trace.
errorMessages.ARTIFACT_RESEND_RATE_LIMITED: That statement was resent too recently. Wait a bit before trying again.
errorMessages.UNKNOWN_ERROR: We couldn't complete this statement action. Please try again or contact support.

artifacts.recentVersionsDescription: Version history generated for each payout trace.
artifacts.recentDeliveriesDescription: Delivery attempts associated with each payout trace.
artifacts.versionsEmpty: No statements have been generated yet.
artifacts.deliveriesEmpty: No resend attempts have been recorded yet.

caseLookup.sectionDescription: Start here when support shares a payout reference, a trace, or another technical identifier.
caseLookup.searchDescription: Search by payout reference, trace, or another technical key shared by support or engineering.
caseLookup.queryPlaceholder: Payout reference, trace, or technical key...
caseLookup.noQueryState: Enter a trace or related identifier to find the right case before opening evidence.
caseLookup.noResultsState: We could not find a case for that identifier. Check the trace, payout reference, or idempotency key.
caseLookup.disambiguationDescription: When one identifier maps to multiple traces, use this grouping to disambiguate.
caseLookup.disambiguationEmpty: No ambiguous matches were detected for this lookup.

disambiguationReasons.fallback: Multiple traces matched this identifier. Review the matching traces to open the correct case.

caseLookup.resultsDescription: Cases are grouped by trace with the matching references and the available operational context.
caseLookup.summaryLabel: Showing {shown} of {total} matching {total, plural, one {case} other {cases}}
caseLookup.summaryLimitedHint: This list is capped to the newest {shown} cases in the current query window. Refine the identifier to narrow the result set.

evidence.sectionDescription: Once you have a trace, this view shows its event history, statements, and policy context.
evidence.requestDescription: Paste a trace from Cases or support tooling.
evidence.noTraceState: Once you have the right trace, load it here to review its history, statements, and policy context.
evidence.notFoundTitle: No evidence found for that trace
evidence.notFoundState: That trace did not return an evidence pack. Verify the identifier or go back to case lookup.
evidence.summaryDescription: Canonical trace history, key timestamps, and redaction metadata.
evidence.policyContextEmpty: No additional policy context was found for this trace.
evidence.eventsDescription: Canonical trace events used to build case evidence.
